message:
refactor(ad): replace match blocks with if-let in NaN/Inf test assertions

In the NaN/Inf gradient propagation tests, replace verbose match
expressions (which silently dropped Err variants via empty arms) with
idiomatic `if let Ok(...)` guards. This makes the intent clearer: Err
is acceptable and skipped, while Ok results are subject to assertions.

Affected tests:
- nan_cotangent_propagates_through_vjp: simplify per-op match loop
- inf_propagates_through_exp_gradient: collapse match to if-let
- inf_propagates_through_square_gradient: collapse match to if-let
- neg_inf_input_gradient: collapse match to if-let
- nan_tangent_propagates_through_jvp_sin: flatten nested Ok arm
- nan_input_propagates_through_jvp_cos: flatten nested Ok arm
- nan_input_gradient_mul: flatten nested Ok arm and clean up comments

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
